title: Farmer’s Dislikes
description: Make your farming life more vivid
body:
This mod aims to make your farming life more interesting.
Currently added a new creature----rat, a cute but annoying animal that will eat hay blocks, melons, pumpkins, and some crops.

Also, cows, sheep, chickens, and other animals will now drop dung, leaving you more jobs to do on the farm! the dung can be put in the composter, too.
